---
title: "Calibrating an early-successional strategy"
description: "Fitting a fast-growing, short-lived strategy and checking it against observed height trajectories."
date: 2026-05-02
plant-version: "2.1.0"
categories: [calibration, case-study]
reading-time: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(here::here("R/version-badge.R"))
```

`r plant_version_badge()`

This post was built against the version badged above. If you're running a
newer `plant`, the API may differ — the result here is frozen to what
2.1.0 produced.

## The strategy

```{r}
#| label: build-strategy
#| eval: false
library(plant)
s <- strategy(FF16_Strategy(
  lma   = 0.05,   # cheap, short-lived leaves
  rho   = 350,    # low wood density — fast height gain
  hmat  = 8
))
```

<!-- ... rest of the worked example ... -->

## Reproducibility footer

```{r}
#| label: session
#| eval: false
plant_session_info()
```
